projects.title: Cortex AI + MCP Analytics App
projects.subtitle: Natural Language BI on Snowflake
projects.description: Conversational analytics app that lets business users query their Snowflake data warehouse in plain English. Powered by Snowflake Cortex AI for LLM-based SQL generation and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for tool-augmented responses — zero query writing required.

projects.title: ELT Pipeline: dbt + Snowflake + Airflow
projects.subtitle: Production-Grade Data Engineering
projects.description: End-to-end ELT pipeline modeled after real enterprise workloads. Apache Airflow (MWAA) orchestrates dbt transformations following Medallion architecture across Bronze → Silver → Gold layers in Snowflake, with incremental models, SCD Type 2 snapshots, and Docker-based Airflow setup.

projects.title: Snowflake Data Profiler
projects.subtitle: Native Snowflake Analytics App
projects.description: Streamlit-in-Snowflake app for deep data profiling — no data ever leaves the warehouse. Delivers instant schema inspection, column-level statistics, null and uniqueness analysis, value distribution charts, and automated data quality scoring across any Snowflake table or view.

projects.title: End-to-End Analytics Pipeline
projects.subtitle: Raw Data → Tableau BI Dashboards
projects.description: Complete modern data stack demonstration: raw ingestion → Snowflake cloud warehouse → dbt modular SQL transformations → Tableau business intelligence dashboards. Shows how each layer of the stack connects to power self-serve reporting for stakeholders.

projects.title: Real-Time Warehousing with Snowflake
projects.subtitle: Event-Driven Ingestion & CDC
projects.description: Real-time data warehousing using Snowflake's native streaming primitives — Streams for change data capture, Tasks for automated trigger-based transformation, and Snowpipe for event-driven ingestion from S3/Azure Blob Storage. Includes dynamic warehouse sizing for cost governance.

projects.title: dbt Jaffle Shop
projects.subtitle: dbt Best Practices Reference
projects.description: Production-ready dbt project built on the open-source Jaffle Shop dataset — a complete reference implementation covering modular model design, generic and singular tests, schema documentation, seeds, snapshots, and environment-based configurations following dbt Labs best practices.
